prompt: Eye-level exterior shot looking down the length of a newly installed 6-foot western red cedar privacy fence along a suburban Methuen MA property line. Vertical board-on-board cedar pickets with capped post tops, fresh raw-cedar reddish-tan tone before any weathering. The fence stretches into the distance with a slight perspective curve. A trimmed lawn on the inside, a neighboring driveway on the outside. A black wrought-iron gate hardware detail visible mid-frame. Shot with a 50mm normal lens, overcast natural daylight — flat even illumination that emphasises the wood grain texture and tone consistency. A red Milwaukee jobsite radio sits in the grass as the only saturated color. Slightly desaturated photography, NOT HGTV bright, working-contractor catalog feel. No readable text, no logos.
